title: The Best Study Plan for Besties

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I knew it was gonna be bad, but our
classic lit and kanji quizzes sooo do not pass the
vibe check!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I can't even with these characters! What are they?
Like some kind of code? There's no way I can
memorize all these!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Group studying's great and all, but I don't even
have the energy to turn the pages in my
textbook...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, girlypops, we gotta do this! We won't be
able to finish studying if we don't start first!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What the heck does "His manners were wanting"
even mean? You know what I want? Something
sweet!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That sounds so yum! Let's hit up a karaoke place
after this, fam! I'm so getting the all-you-can-eat
ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now that's an idea I can get behind. We should
order fries while we're there. I think the place by
the station has—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, back up, y'all! We've gotta stop yapping
and focus!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's it! I just thought of something
awesome!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Classic lit's just a bunch of words written down,
but if we use them while chatting, maybe we can
remember them better!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That idea is gas, Palmer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I confess, Miss Palmer's idea is a rather ingenious
one. Ooh, that sounded pretty old-timey, didn't
it?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Palmer! The notes thou lent me hath
proved straight fire. Allow me to treat you to a
veritable feast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Why, think nothing of it! We must learn as one
and grow as one!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Dang! You two sound like you walked right out of
our classic lit books!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer's vivid imagination leads her and
her friends to new heights!
